tagline: Freshly baked sourdough bread — Naturally Better
specials: Ask about today's Soup of the Day!

categoryIntros.Classic Sandwiches: 14 signature sandwiches on our freshly baked sourdough — 4", 6", or 8" size. All include house spread, lettuce, tomatoes, onions, mustard, and your choice of cheese.
categoryIntros.Specialty Sandwiches: Chef-crafted 6" sandwiches prepared hot on freshly baked sourdough.
categoryIntros.Gourmet Salads: Made-to-order salads served with sourdough bread. Small or large.
categoryIntros.Soups: House-made daily — cup, bowl, or in a warm sourdough bread bowl.
categoryIntros.Sides & Extras: Round out your meal or customize your sandwich.
